scores.correctness_notes: All events from the gold standard are present and correctly described. The response includes all static events (install, start, stop, remove, config_changed, upgrade_charm, leader_elected, leader_settings_changed, update_status, collect_app_status, collect_unit_status, collect_metrics, secret_*, pre/post_series_upgrade) and all dynamic event categories (relation, storage, container/pebble, action). Notably missing is update_status in the main listing, but it's implicitly covered. Actually on re-check, update_status is not explicitly listed — that's a minor omission.
